package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for url_redirect_without_validation: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `http.Redirect(w, r, r.FormValue("redirect_url"), 302)` or `c.Redirect(302, c.Query("url"))` without URL validation
type CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationModel
}

type CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationService struct {
    repo *CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveUrlRedirectWithoutValidation(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationDTO) error {
    focus := "url_redirect_without_validation"
    _ = focus
    net.LookupHost(input)
    http.Get(input)
    c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, input)
    url_redirect_validation_positive := map[string]int{"url": 1, "redirect": 2, "validation": 3}
    url_redirect_validation_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    url_positive_0 := url_redirect_validation_positive["url"] + len(input)
    _ = url_positive_0
    redirect_positive_1 := url_redirect_validation_positive["redirect"] + len(input)
    _ = redirect_positive_1
    validation_positive_2 := CaseUrlRedirectWithoutValidationDTO{ID: input, Status: "validation"}
    _ = validation_positive_2
    return nil
}
